Life Cover Methodology

Configure how Life Cover (death benefit) is calculated.

Fixed Costs
Estate administration costs added to every Life calculation.
Debt Clearance
Typically 100%. If unlocked, staff can adjust.
✓ Saved

TPD Methodology

Configure Total & Permanent Disability calculation parameters.

Debt Clearance

Staff enter one total debt figure; these percentages are applied separately.

e.g. investment loans
e.g. mortgage, personal loans
Medical & Tax
Rehabilitation, home modifications, ongoing care.
Enable Tax Top-Up ProvisionAdds a tax provision using a flat % rate below
Flat rate applied to total TPD need when tax top-up is on.
Principal Residence
Include Purchase of Principal ResidenceAdds a property purchase cost if client doesn't own their home
Ongoing Needs (admin-set, not shown to staff — silently included in TPD total)
These amounts are silently added to the TPD total. Staff do not see these fields or their contribution.
✓ Saved

Trauma Methodology

Configure Trauma Cover calculation components.

Medical & Care Costs
Flat dollar amount for in-home carer support.
Living Expenses Replacement

One-off lump sum calculated as X% of the client's non-deductible debt balance.

✓ Saved

Income Protection Methodology

Configure how the IP monthly benefit is calculated.

Income Replacement Rate
Typically 70%. Admin-only setting.
When income exceeds $250,000 a notice will appear on the PDF output card about insurer replacement ratio differences.
Super Replacement Benefit
Capped at 15%. Values above 15% default back to 15%.
✓ Saved

Manage Staff Users

Add or remove staff accounts. Each user's calculations are stored separately.

Current Staff Users
To add staff in bulk, use add-users.mjs — users will appear here immediately. For one-off additions, create the account in the Supabase Authentication dashboard, then they'll appear here automatically on their first login and be prompted to set their password.

All Calculations

View and export calculations run by all staff users.

Calculation History

Admin Credentials

User accounts and passwords are now managed via Supabase Authentication.

Manage Users & Passwords
To add, remove, or reset passwords for any user:
1. Go to your Supabase project dashboard → Authentication → Users
2. Create new users with their email address and a temporary password
3. Set their role in User Metadata: {"role": "staff", "display_name": "Their Name"}
4. For admins: {"role": "admin"}

Users will appear in the Staff Users list after their first login.

Based on your inputs — figures in today's dollars.

● Life Cover (Death)
$0
Lump sum to clear debts, replace income and support your family.
● Total & Permanent Disability
$0
Lump sum if you become totally and permanently unable to work.
● Income Protection
Income Sum Insured
$0/mo
Monthly benefit if you can't work due to illness or injury.
Super Benefit
$0/mo
Employer super contributions lost while on claim

Lump sum on diagnosis of cancer, heart attack, stroke or similar.
